column1: # Known cloud services whose use — when NOT on the sanctioned allowlist
# (ml/sanctioned_services.txt) — constitutes Shadow IT. detect() matches a
# flow's extracted destination hostname (TLS SNI / HTTP Host / passive DNS)
# against these entries and flags UNSANCTIONED matches as Shadow IT
# independent of the ML anomaly score. This is the signal that actually
# answers the project title: normal-looking traffic to an unauthorised cloud
# app is invisible to an intrusion model but is exactly what Shadow IT is.
# Matching = exact host or subdomain (drive.google.com matches
# my.drive.google.com; the most specific catalog entry wins).
#   risk drives risk_level when a flow is flagged by the catalog (not the ML).
#   Categories with data-exfiltration / policy-evasion potential score higher.
